purpose: Images stacked as a deck of cards. Each card deals forward to take focus, then slides away to reveal the next. Best for dramatic sequential reveals, dossier cards, breach notifications, layered reports.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Optional label badge in top-left. Example: 'CLASSIFIED FILES'
fields.ACCENT_COLOR: Color for the active card border and progress bar. Example: #f59e0b
fields.FRAMES_PER_SLIDE: How long the active card is on screen before dealing the next. Example: 80 = ~2.6 seconds. Default: 80
fields.IMAGE_URL_1: URL to first uploaded card image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_1 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_2: URL to second uploaded card image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_2 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_3: URL to third uploaded card image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_3 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_4: URL to fourth uploaded card image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_4 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_5: URL to fifth uploaded card image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_5 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_6: URL to sixth uploaded card image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_6 if not yet uploaded.
fields.CAPTION_1: Caption text on first card. Example: 'Incident Report #2847'
fields.SUGGESTION_1: Describe exactly what photo or document image the user should upload for card 1. Be specific. Example: 'Upload a photo of the first suspect or a cover page of the incident report'
fields.SUGGESTION_2: Describe what to upload for card 2. Example: 'Upload a screenshot of the malware or attack tool'
fields.SUGGESTION_3: Describe what to upload for card 3. Leave blank if only 2 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_4: Describe what to upload for card 4. Leave blank if fewer than 4 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_5: Describe what to upload for card 5. Leave blank if fewer than 5 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_6: Describe what to upload for card 6. Leave blank if fewer than 6 images are needed.
